initial.name: panchangpal
initial.description: PanchangPal — a calm, trust-first, offline-first Hindu spiritual companion. Monorepo (pnpm + Turborepo, TDD Part 1 §4).

initial.name: @panchangpal/design-tokens
initial.description: Design token values (PDD Part 3 §6). The single UI vocabulary bound by packages/ui; no hard-coded colors/spacing/durations elsewhere (TDD Part 1 §1.3/§5).

initial.name: @panchangpal/shared
initial.description: Shared domain types and the canonical EVT_*/ERR_* + enum sources consumed by app and Edge Functions (TDD Part 1 §1.3/§4).

initial.name: @panchangpal/ai
initial.description: Server-shared RAG helpers: prompt builder, scope guardrails, retrieval. Used by SVC_ask_guru + SVC_content_ingest. Server-only — never imported by the mobile app (ADR-006/011).

initial.name: @panchangpal/api
initial.description: Typed API_* contracts (zod schemas) shared by the mobile client and Edge Functions. Generated against docs/api/openapi.yaml + TDD Part 2 §5 (F-8 backend-owned).

initial.name: @panchangpal/database
initial.description: Generated DB types (from apps/backend/migrations) + RLS helper references. Types are regenerated via `supabase gen types` in CI.

scripts.gen: echo 'CI: supabase gen types typescript --local > src/generated.ts'

initial.name: @panchangpal/ui
initial.description: CMP_* React Native component library (PDD Part 3 §5), bound to @panchangpal/design-tokens. Accessibility-first (ADR-029). UI never imports the data layer (TDD Part 1 §5).

initial.name: @panchangpal/mobile
initial.description: PanchangPal Expo app (React Native, Expo Router). Feature-sliced per TDD Part 1 §2.3 / Part 4. App shell + wiring only — features are built in later tasks.
